project.name: Brownfield app/apk/relay Reference
project.description: A bounded incremental-governance reference for an existing multi-module repository.

fact.owns: Reference Project Model, Plan, Knowledge Gaps, and adoption boundary facts.
The provisional public app request Contract.
The provisional public apk delivery Contract.
Governed relay routing behavior and its focused proof.

governed.reason: The reference governance documents have an explicit owner and ordinary amendment authority.
Relay behavior has a focused executable Contract proof through an injected delivery port.

provisional.reason: Only the public app request Contract is modeled; broader app behavior is not yet governed.
Only the public apk delivery Contract is modeled; device delivery behavior is not yet governed.

opaque.reason: The legacy device bridge remains intentionally unmodeled during incremental adoption.

dispositions.rationale: Legacy implementation is classified for total path coverage but grants no automatic write authority.
